title: Golden Age Plastic Texture Pack
description: The Plastic Texture Pack ported to Java Beta 1.7.3
body:
The Plastic Texture Pack ported to Java Beta 1.7
Original Pack By 4J Studios

This brightly colored and simple pack adds plastic-themed textures for blocks, items, and entities, and a completely transformed UI.

All animated textures are default ones for now, couldn't find a way to change them. (Optifine users have water and lava, but its not perfect)
